use_codes.desc: PREVENTION OR TREATMENT OF ISCHEMIC HEART DISEASE

indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
NORVASC® is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure reduces the
risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been seen
in controlled trials of antihypertensiv...

1. Hypertension
NORVASC is indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may be used alone or in combination with
other antihypertensive agents.
